SpessaSharp

Namespace SpessaSharp.Synthesizer.Engine.Channel

Classes

Awe32NRPN
Awe32NRPN.ChannelGenerators
ChannelSnapshot

Represents a snapshot of a single channel's state in the synthesizer.

DynamicModulatorManager

A class for dynamic modulators that are assigned for more complex system exclusive messages

MidiChannel

This class represents a single MIDI Channel within the synthesizer.

Structs

DrumParameters

Represents a single drum instrument's XG/GS parameters.

Enums

MidiChannel.Assign

Parameter that determines how voice assignment will be handled when sounds overlap on identical note numbers in the same channel (i.e., repeatedly struck notes). This is initialized to a mode suitable for each Part, so for general purposes there is no need to change this.

Made with docfx
